'''''Bedwana Wangas Ateema''''' was [[Dreddon]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] personal luxury freighter. In [[Huttese/Legends|Huttese]], the name meant "To buy guns this time".

{{Ship-stub}}
